title: scanner: no birthday height enforcement — fresh wallet scans from genesis
description: Scenario: user initialises wallet without calling set_scan_tip first. scan_tip() returns 0, scanner starts from block 1 and attempts to download ~2.2M blocks before reaching the wallet's actual birthday. This will generate issue reports from users who see 'scanning' for hours. Documentation says 'callers should call set_scan_tip with an appropriate birthday height' but there is no runtime guard. Maintenance consequence: until enforcement is added, we own every bug report from users who miss the docs. Fix: either require birthday height in CompactBlockScanner::new, or assert scan_tip >= SAPLING_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT before starting, or log a prominent warn! when scan_tip == 0.
close_reason: Fixed: scan_to_tip() emits warn! when scan_tip==0, explaining the genesis-scan consequence and pointing to set_scan_tip()
